title: Soehrensia schickendantzii
taxonomy: Soehrensia schickendantzii is classified within the family Cactaceae, which is a large group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Americas. This species belongs to the genus Soehrensia, which is a group of cacti that are native to Argentina and Bolivia. The classification of Soehrensia schickendantzii is further specified as belonging to the subfamily Cactoideae, which is a subfamily within the family Cactaceae. Within the subfamily Cactoideae, Soehrensia schickendantzii is placed in the tribe Pachycereae, which is a group of cacti that are characterized by their columnar stems and are often found in the Andean region.
